title: Physics: Thermodynamics Basics
description: Temperature, heat transfer, and the laws of thermodynamics.

questions.question: Heat naturally flows from:
choices: A colder object to a hotter object.
A hotter object to a colder object.
An object with less mass to one with more mass.
questions.explanation: Thermal energy naturally transfers from higher temperature to lower temperature.

questions.question: Which law states that energy cannot be created or destroyed?
questions.explanation: The First Law expresses conservation of energy.

questions.question: Which mode of heat transfer does not require a material medium?
questions.explanation: Radiation can travel through a vacuum.
